chunks.text: August IRIS Server Patching | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar August IRIS Server Patching Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, August 13th, 2024. Various IRIS Windows and Linux se

gust 13th, 2024. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday or Wednesday. PRINT, WINTERM and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, August 14th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesda

WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, depending on additional software updates. Linux servers lists.eecs, iris2.eecs (for access to the network and roster databases), and login.eecs will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS ser

l be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cronus and rhea may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. Updates to our VMware servers on Tuesday night may mean brief service interruptions to various IRI

ay mean brief service interruptions to various IRIS services hosted on virtual machines. On Wednesday, August 14th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled)

downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). UPDATE [2024-08-15 | larsrohr ] Resolved as of 2024-08-15 1:00am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to camp
